  "society_power": 7.5,

  "key_event": "Rise of Industrial Capitalism and Urbanization",
  "reasoning": "Industrialization and urbanization weakened civil society by creating social tensions and inequalities, while strengthening the state through increased tax revenue and administrative demands."
